6:
WITH cust_consumption AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption AS (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cust_consumption
)
SELECT 
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM cust_consumption, min_consumption
WHERE total_consumption = min_consumption.min_total;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID, ym.Date, ym.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
),
yearly AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        CAST(substr(f.Date,1,4) AS INTEGER) AS Year,
        SUM(f.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM filtered f
    JOIN customers c ON f.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, Year
),
growth AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        (SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2013 THEN TotalConsumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2012 THEN TotalConsumption END)) * 100.0 
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2012 THEN TotalConsumption END),0) AS PctGrowth
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT Segment AS SegmentWithMaxGrowth, PctGrowth AS GrowthPercentage
FROM growth
WHERE PctGrowth = (SELECT MAX(PctGrowth) FROM growth)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, PctGrowth
FROM growth
WHERE PctGrowth = (SELECT MIN(PctGrowth) FROM growth);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH cust_exp AS (
  SELECT t."CustomerID",
         SUM(t."Amount" * t."Price") AS total_expense,
         SUM(t."Amount") AS total_amount
  FROM "transactions_1k" t
  GROUP BY t."CustomerID"
),
max_cust AS (
  SELECT "CustomerID"
  FROM cust_exp
  ORDER BY total_expense DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT c."CustomerID",
       c."Currency",
       ce.total_expense,
       ce.total_expense / ce.total_amount AS avg_price_per_unit
FROM cust_exp ce
JOIN max_cust mc ON ce."CustomerID" = mc."CustomerID"
JOIN customers c ON c."CustomerID" = ce."CustomerID";	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

  ma.marvel_cnt AS marvel_count

),
